tar_layout.disk/account_data/: Chat history + friend list + avatars; restore to .../account_data/
tar_layout.disk/profiles/: Tox profile blobs; restore to ~/Library/Containers/com.toxee.app/Data/Library/Application Support/com.toxee.app/profiles/
tar_layout.manifest.json: Self-describing manifest; sibling-copy at tool/mcp_test/fixtures/echo_peer_seeded_manifest.json for git-diff visibility
tar_layout.prefs/prefs_dump.json: Serialized NSUserDefaults flutter.* keys; restore via defaults write loop
